description: Prisma DB adapter refactor touching database adapters, docs, and config
rationale: conversion.ts and query-interpreter.ts import @prisma/ packages → semantic analysis correctly classifies as database (133 lines). README.md = docs (10 lines). package.json files = config (84 lines). 3 domains above noise threshold = ERROR.
notes: Tree-sitter semantic analysis correctly identifies @prisma/ imports → database domain. This PR is genuinely multi-domain: adapter code + docs + config.
